exercises.code:
# dual explorer-H1 · S17-T1-A-E1
import pandas as pd
cli=pd.DataFrame({'cliente_id':['C001','C002']})
tx=pd.DataFrame({'cliente_id':['C001'],'monto':[1.0]})
m = cli.merge(tx, on='cliente_id', how='left')
h1_out = len(m)
print(h1_out)

Fixture `FIX-S17-T1A-E1`: cli={C001,C002}, tx={C001:1.0}. Haz `merge` por `cliente…». # dual explorer-H1 · S17-T1-A-E3
import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"] * 3, "monto": [1.0, 2.0, 3.0]})
m = cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", how="inner")
h1_out = len(m)
print(h1_out)

exercises.code:
# dual explorer-H1 · S17-T1-B-E1
import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C002"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"], "monto": [1.0]})
m = cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", how="left", indicator=True)
orph = m.loc[m["_merge"] == "left_only", "cliente_id"].tolist()
h1_out = orph
print(h1_out)
exercises.justification_from_packet: En «Joins, reshape, groupby y cierre analítico» (S17) resolví S17-T1-B-E1 leyendo el instruction del quiz_card: «E1 (guiado) — Concepto: anti-join con `indicator=True`. Fixture cli={C001,C002}, tx solo C001. Left merge + filtra `_merge=='left_only'`; im…». exercises.code:
# dual explorer-H1 · S17-T1-B-E2
import pandas as pd
a = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1]})
b = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1, 1]})
try:
    a.merge(b, on="id", validate="one_to_one")
    print("ok")
except Exception:
h1_out = "fail"
print(h1_out)

# dual explorer-H1 · S17-T2-A-E2
import pandas as pd
long = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1, 1], "k": ["a", "b"], "v": [1.0, 2.0]})
wide = long.pivot_table(index="id", columns="k", values="v", aggfunc="sum").reset_index()
h1_out = wide.columns.tolist()
print(h1_out)

# dual explorer-H1 · S17-T2-B-E1
import pandas as pd
long = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1, 1], "mes": ["e", "f"], "monto": [1.0, 2.0]})
wide = long.pivot(index="id", columns="mes", values="monto")
wide = wide.rename(columns=lambda c: f"monto_{c}")
h1_out = list(wide.columns)
print(h1_out)
